Evidence Level: Moderate

Peak

Popular brain training with 40+ games designed by neuroscientists and game experts.

About This Tool

Peak offers diverse cognitive games with a unique Brain Performance Index and Coach feature for personalized recommendations.

How It Helps

  • Memory — working memory and spatial recall
  • Mental agility — processing speed exercises
  • Problem-solving — logic and planning challenges
  • Language — vocabulary and verbal fluency
  • Coordination — hand-eye motor control
  • Brain Performance Index — unified tracking

Best For

Memory & Brain Fog

Dedicated memory games

ADHD & Focus

Quick games train attention

Depression & Mood

Achievement system motivates

Anxiety & Panic

Short sessions accessible anytime

Visit Peak →

Alternative Tools

Other tools you might find useful for similar goals.

Lumosity

Personalized daily cognitive workouts.

Elevate

Practical communication skills.

CogniFit

Validated assessments and training.
